history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A colorful game interface shows a character avatar in a purple-lit room while multiple menus display outfit and item options.

Main Subject:
A stylized human-like avatar stands on a platform, one foot forward and legs spread slightly, holding a long sword-like or staff-like weapon angled downward to the right. The avatar has a horned headpiece with an orange glow, wears a light blue and white striped short-sleeve top, patterned dark shorts with light patches, a red lower cloth or band at one knee area, and fingerless gloves. The character’s head is tilted slightly upward and the figure is barefoot on the platform.

Setting:
The background is a game-style interior space with a purple gradient atmosphere and soft haze. A large circular selection UI appears behind the avatar, and there are multiple rectangular menu panels arranged around the screen. The lighting is predominantly purple and magenta with glowing UI elements, and the floor and walls appear as part of the stylized environment.

Visual Details:
The screen is filled with overlapping UI panels. On the left, vertical menu sections include a highlighted “FASHION” label at the top, and several category items listed beneath it. Two grid panels show character silhouettes and outfit thumbnails with bright neon borders in pink, purple, and blue. Near the top-left, another small panel displays “EMOTE” and “SEMU A TIER” (spelled unclear as “SEMU A TIER” in the visible text). On the right side, a circular wheel menu with multiple character pose icons surrounds the avatar, with a highlighted segment labeled “BOQUA.” At the bottom, a section labeled “SEMUA” shows a list of rarity categories with colored diamond shapes and a grid of weapon thumbnails with level indicators such as “Lv3,” “Lv4,” and other unclear level numbers. A white button near the right reads “UNEQUIP.” The camera angle is a front-facing, slightly elevated view focused on the avatar and menus.

Visible Text:
FASHION
EMOTE
SKILL SKIN
POSTUR
COLLECTION
KENDARAAN
PROFILE
LAINNYA
SEMU A TIER
CRAMADAN
VAULT
UN EQuIP
GALLERY
SEMUA
SEMUA (TYPE)
SEMUA (MODEL)
BOQUA
No other clearly readable text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a screenshot of a video game customization or selection interface. It features a horned character avatar standing on a glowing platform while outfit, emote, and weapon grids and selection wheels fill the screen.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
